topics.title: Word (Kelas Kata)
topics.description: Identifikasi 8 parts of speech: Noun, Pronoun, Verb, Adjective, Adverb, Preposition, Conjunction, Interjection

questions.question: Dalam kalimat 'The intelligent student reads a book carefully', kata 'intelligent' adalah...
questions.explanation: Adjective. 'Intelligent' memodifikasi noun 'student' untuk menjelaskan sifat/karakteristik. Adjective selalu menerangkan noun.

questions.question: Manakah yang merupakan Adverb dalam kalimat: 'She walks slowly through the beautiful park'?
questions.explanation: Slowly. Adverb memodifikasi verb dan menjawab 'bagaimana?'. 'Slowly' menjelaskan cara/manner berjalan. Berakhiran -ly adalah ciri adverb.

questions.question: Kata 'run' dalam 'They run every morning' berfungsi sebagai...
questions.explanation: Verb. Menunjukkan aksi/kegiatan. Dalam kalimat, verb adalah kata yang menunjukkan apa yang dilakukan subject.

questions.question: Dalam 'She gave him her book', pronoun 'him' adalah...
questions.explanation: Object pronoun. 'Him' menerima aksi 'gave'. Object pronoun (me, him, her, us, them) selalu setelah verb atau preposisi.

questions.question: Manakah yang BUKAN Preposition?
questions.explanation: 'Quickly' adalah Adverb (berakhiran -ly). Preposition: in, on, under, at, to, from, with, by. Preposition menunjukkan hubungan tempat/waktu/cara.

questions.question: Interjection dalam kalimat berikut adalah...: 'Wow! That's an amazing performance!'
questions.explanation: 'Wow' adalah Interjection - ungkapan emosi/perasaan spontan. Diikuti tanda seru (!). Fungsinya menunjukkan reaksi/perasaan.

questions.question: Dalam 'The cat and the dog play together', kata 'and' adalah...
questions.explanation: Conjunction. 'And' menghubungkan 'cat' dan 'dog'. Conjunction (and, but, or) menghubungkan kata/frasa/klausa yang setara.

questions.question: Part of speech mana yang paling sering berfungsi sebagai subject dalam kalimat?
questions.explanation: Noun. Noun (atau pronoun) selalu sebagai subject - orang/benda yang melakukan aksi. Contoh: 'The dog runs' - 'dog' (noun) adalah subject.

questions.question: Dalam kalimat 'She is very happy about the news', 'very' adalah...
questions.explanation: Adverb. 'Very' memodifikasi adjective 'happy' untuk menunjukkan tingkat/derajat. Adverb dapat memodifikasi adjective juga, bukan hanya verb.

questions.question: Manakah pair yang BENAR menurut fungsi part of speech?
questions.explanation: 'Intelligent' (adjective) memodifikasi 'student' (noun) - pasangan yang tepat. Adjective harus memodifikasi noun; adverb memodifikasi verb/adjective.

topics.title: Pronouns (Kata Ganti)
topics.description: Personal, Possessive, Relative, Demonstrative, Reflexive, Indefinite Pronouns

questions.question: Pronoun mana yang tepat untuk 'I gave ___ a gift'?
questions.explanation: 'Him' adalah object pronoun. Setelah verb 'gave' harus pakai object pronoun (me, him, her, us, them), bukan subject pronoun (he, she, they).

questions.question: Dalam 'This pen is mine', 'mine' adalah jenis pronoun apa?
questions.explanation: Possessive pronoun. 'Mine' menunjukkan kepemilikan dan berdiri sendiri. Beda dengan possessive adjective 'my' (my pen). 'Mine' = 'my pen'.

questions.question: Relative pronoun mana untuk 'The girl ___ won the competition is smart'?
questions.explanation: 'Who' untuk orang dan berposisi sebagai subject di relative clause. 'Whom' untuk object; 'which' untuk benda; 'whose' untuk kepemilikan.

questions.question: Dalam 'These books are interesting but those are boring', 'those' adalah...
questions.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun. 'This/these' = dekat, 'that/those' = jauh. Berfungsi menunjuk objek tertentu dari jarak/konteks berbeda.

questions.question: Reflexive pronoun dalam 'She did it herself' adalah...
questions.explanation: 'Herself' adalah reflexive pronoun. Aksi kembali ke subject (she = herself). Ciri: berakhiran -self/-selves. Contoh: myself, yourself, himself.

questions.question: Indefinite pronoun manakah yang paling cocok: 'I don't know ___ who can help us'?
questions.explanation: 'Anyone' - indefinite pronoun dalam kalimat negatif/pertanyaan. 'Someone' untuk kalimat positif. 'Anyone' = siapa saja (dalam konteks negatif).

questions.question: Manakah yang BUKAN possessive pronoun?
questions.explanation: 'Their' adalah possessive adjective, bukan pronoun. Possessive pronoun: mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs (berdiri sendiri). 'Their' selalu sebelum noun (their car).

questions.question: Dalam 'The student who studied hard passed the exam', jenis pronoun 'who' adalah...
questions.explanation: Relative pronoun. 'Who' menghubungkan clause 'who studied hard' ke noun 'student'. Relative pronouns: who, whom, which, that, whose.

questions.question: Pronoun apa yang harus digunakan setelah preposisi 'between'? 'Between you and ___'
questions.explanation: 'Me' adalah object pronoun. Setelah preposisi (in, on, to, between, with, etc.) selalu pakai object pronoun, bukan subject pronoun 'I'.

questions.question: Dalam 'Everyone has their own opinion', 'their' adalah...
questions.explanation: 'Their' adalah possessive adjective - selalu sebelum noun 'opinion'. Walau subject singular (everyone), modern English pakai 'their' untuk gender-neutral.

questions.question: Conjunction mana yang tepat: 'I stayed home ___ it was raining'?
questions.explanation: 'Because' - subordinating conjunction yang menunjukkan sebab/alasan. 'But' = kontras, 'and' = penambahan, 'so' = akibat/hasil.

questions.question: Manakah coordinating conjunction (FANBOYS)?
questions.explanation: 'Yet' adalah coordinating conjunction. FANBOYS: For, And, Nor, But, Or, Yet, So. Menghubungkan 2 independent clause yang setara.

questions.question: Kalimat mana yang menggunakan subordinating conjunction dengan BENAR?
options: Although happy, but he didn't smile
Although he was happy, he didn't smile
He didn't smile although but he was happy
Although, he was happy he didn't smile
questions.explanation: Opsi B benar. Subordinating conjunction (although) tidak boleh bersama coordinating conjunction (but). 'Although' sudah menunjukkan kontras, tidak perlu 'but'.

questions.question: Dalam 'She speaks English and French', 'and' adalah jenis conjunction apa?
questions.explanation: Coordinating conjunction. 'And' menghubungkan 2 noun setara (English & French). Coordinating conjunctions untuk elemen yang parallel/setara.

questions.question: Correlative conjunction pasangan yang tepat: 'She speaks ___ English ___ French'
questions.explanation: 'Both...and' - untuk menunjukkan keduanya. 'Either...or' = salah satu, 'neither...nor' = tidak keduanya. Correlative = berpasangan selalu.

questions.question: Subordinating conjunction mana untuk menunjukkan WAKTU?
questions.explanation: 'When' menunjukkan waktu. Subordinating conjunctions: because (reason), if (condition), when (time), although (contrast), while (time/contrast), as (time/reason).

questions.question: Dalam 'I will go to the party unless it rains', 'unless' adalah...
questions.explanation: Subordinating conjunction. 'Unless' = kecuali/jika tidak (negative condition). Membuat dependent clause yang membutuhkan independent clause untuk melengkapi.

questions.question: Conjunction manakah yang SALAH digunakan dalam kalimat berikut? 'He is smart and hardworking yet lazy'
questions.explanation: Tidak ada yang salah. 'And' menghubungkan smart + hardworking, 'yet' menunjukkan kontras dengan lazy. Penggunaan valid meski berurutan.

questions.question: Subordinating conjunction untuk SYARAT/KONDISI adalah...
questions.explanation: 'If' untuk kondisi. Contoh: 'If you study hard, you will pass.' Subordinating conjunctions kondisi: if, unless, as long as, provided that.

questions.question: Manakah pasangan BENAR untuk correlative conjunction?
questions.explanation: 'Neither...nor' adalah pasangan benar. Correlative pairs: both...and, either...or, neither...nor, not only...but also, whether...or, as...as.

topics.title: Phrase (Kelompok Kata)
topics.description: Noun Phrase, Prepositional Phrase, Verb Phrase, Adjective Phrase, Adverbial Phrase

questions.question: Dalam 'The intelligent student reads', 'The intelligent student' adalah jenis phrase apa?
questions.explanation: Noun phrase. Terdiri dari article + adjective + noun. Berfungsi seperti noun dalam kalimat (sebagai subject di sini).

questions.question: Manakah yang merupakan Prepositional Phrase?
questions.explanation: 'In the library' - dimulai dengan preposition 'in' + noun phrase 'the library'. Prepositional phrase menjelaskan tempat/waktu/cara.

questions.question: Dalam 'She will be studying', 'will be studying' adalah...
questions.explanation: Verb phrase. Terdiri dari auxiliary verbs (will, be) + main verb (studying). Berfungsi sebagai predicate dalam kalimat.

questions.question: Adjective Phrase dalam kalimat 'The extremely beautiful sunset' adalah...
questions.explanation: 'Extremely beautiful' - adverb (extremely) + adjective (beautiful) memodifikasi noun 'sunset'. Adjective phrase = adjective + modifier.

questions.question: Prepositional phrase 'on the table' berfungsi memodifikasi noun apa dalam 'Put the book on the table'?
questions.explanation: Memodifikasi 'the book'. Preposisi 'on' + 'the table' menjelaskan di mana book harus diletakkan. Prepositional phrase berfungsi sebagai adjective/adverb.

questions.question: Manakah yang BUKAN Noun Phrase?
questions.explanation: 'Running fast' adalah verb phrase (running = verb form + fast = adverb). Noun phrase selalu berpusat pada noun, bukan verb.

questions.question: Adverbial Phrase dalam 'They worked very hard on the project' adalah...
questions.explanation: 'Very hard on the project' - menjelaskan BAGAIMANA mereka bekerja. Bisa kombinasi adverb phrase + prepositional phrase berfungsi sebagai adverbial.

questions.question: Dalam 'The tall, dark, handsome stranger', berapa banyak adjective dalam noun phrase?
questions.explanation: 3 adjectives: tall, dark, handsome. Semuanya memodifikasi noun 'stranger'. Noun phrase bisa punya multiple adjectives sebelum noun.

questions.question: Verb phrase 'has been studying' terdiri dari berapa kata?
questions.explanation: 3 kata: 'has' (auxiliary) + 'been' (auxiliary) + 'studying' (main verb). Verb phrase = semua auxiliary verbs + main verb.

questions.question: Manakah kalimat di mana Prepositional Phrase berfungsi sebagai Adjective (memodifikasi noun)?
options: The house on the hill is old
questions.explanation: 'On the hill' memodifikasi noun 'house' (mana house? yang di bukit). Opsi lain: PP berfungsi sebagai adverb (memodifikasi verb).

topics.title: Adjective Order (Urutan Kata Sifat)
topics.description: OSASCOMP: Opinion, Size, Age, Shape, Color, Origin, Material, Purpose

questions.question: Urutan yang BENAR untuk 'Italian leather bag nice a'?
questions.explanation: Opinion (nice) → Origin (Italian) → Material (leather) → Noun (bag). OSASCOMP: Opinion selalu paling depan, Material sebelum noun.

questions.question: Dalam 'a beautiful old round table', urutannya adalah...
questions.explanation: Beautiful (opinion) → old (age) → round (shape) → table (noun). OSASCOMP order: Opinion-Size-Age-Shape-Color-Origin-Material-Purpose.

questions.question: Manakah urutan adjective yang SALAH?
questions.explanation: 'A red big apple' salah. Benar: 'a big red apple' (Size sebelum Color). Color (red) harus setelah Size (big), sebelum noun.

questions.question: Urutan yang BENAR untuk 'wooden small beautiful chair not'?
questions.explanation: Beautiful (opinion) → small (size) → wooden (material) → chair (noun). Opsi A = OSASCOMP order yang tepat.

questions.question: Dalam OSASCOMP, 'Origin' berarti adjective yang menunjukkan...
questions.explanation: Asal negara/tempat. Contoh: Italian, American, Japanese, African. Origin dalam OSASCOMP selalu sebelum Material dan Noun.

questions.question: Urutan yang BENAR untuk 'round table big wooden white not'?
options: a big white wooden round table
a round big wooden white table
a wooden big round white table
questions.explanation: Big (size) → round (shape) → wooden (material) → table (noun). 'White' tidak ada dalam original description; urutan: Size-Shape-Material-Noun.

questions.question: Dalam 'a 10-year-old Chinese porcelain vase', adjective 'Chinese' adalah kategori...
questions.explanation: 'Chinese' = Origin (asal negara). Age (10-year-old) → Origin (Chinese) → Material (porcelain) → Noun (vase). Order ini benar.

questions.question: Manakah yang paling cocok menggambarkan 'Purpose' dalam OSASCOMP?
questions.explanation: 'Sleeping' (sleeping bag, sleeping pill) = Purpose. Purpose adjectives menunjukkan tujuan/fungsi, paling dekat dengan noun. Contoh: dining room, evening dress.

questions.question: Urutan SALAH mana dalam pilihan ini?
questions.explanation: Opsi C & D salah. Opinion (beautiful) paling depan. Benar: Opinion-Size-Color-Noun. 'A beautiful large blue car' atau 'a large beautiful blue car' keduanya bisa.

questions.question: Dalam 'a Japanese silk traditional dress', urutan SEHARUSNYA adalah...
questions.explanation: Opinion/Purpose (traditional) → Origin (Japanese) → Material (silk) → Noun (dress). Purpose-like adjectives (traditional) sebelum Origin; Material sebelum noun.

topics.title: Clause (Anak & Induk Kalimat)
topics.description: Independent vs Dependent Clause, cara mengidentifikasi, dan fungsinya dalam kalimat

questions.question: Manakah yang merupakan Independent Clause?
questions.explanation: 'She joined the club' - memiliki subject (she) + verb (joined) + makna lengkap, bisa berdiri sendiri. Yang lain dimulai subordinator (when, because, although).

questions.question: Dalam 'If you study hard, you will pass', clause manakah yang dependent?
questions.explanation: 'If you study hard' = dependent clause. Dimulai 'if' (subordinator), makna menggantung/tidak lengkap tanpa induk kalimat. Butuh 'you will pass' untuk melengkapi.

questions.question: Ciri utama Dependent Clause adalah...
questions.explanation: Dependent clause diawali subordinator (if, when, because, although, while, as, etc.) atau relative pronoun (who, which, that). Tidak bisa berdiri sendiri.

questions.question: Dalam kalimat 'The student who studied hard passed the exam', clause yang bold adalah jenis apa? (who studied hard)
questions.explanation: Dependent adjective clause. 'Who studied hard' memodifikasi noun 'student' (mana student? yang belajar keras). Adjective clause = relative clause.

questions.question: Manakah kalimat yang memiliki 2 Independent Clauses?
options: She studied because she wanted to pass
I like coffee and she likes tea
When it rains, we stay inside
He arrived after everyone had left
questions.explanation: 'I like coffee' (IC) + 'and' (coordinating) + 'she likes tea' (IC). Kalimat 1/3/4 punya 1 IC + 1 DC. Kalimat 2 = Compound sentence (2 IC).

questions.question: Dependent Clause manakah yang berfungsi sebagai NOUN dalam kalimat? (menjawabrequest 'I know that you are smart'?
questions.explanation: 'That you are smart' = noun clause (object dari verb 'know'). Menjawab pertanyaan 'apa yang saya ketahui?' Diawali 'that' sebagai subordinator/connector.

questions.question: Dalam 'Although he was tired, he continued working', clause mana yang independent?
questions.explanation: 'He continued working' = independent clause (subject + verb, makna lengkap). 'Although he was tired' = dependent clause (makna menggantung karena 'although').

questions.question: Subordinating conjunction untuk TIME (waktu) dalam dependent clause adalah...
questions.explanation: 'When' = time conjunction. Contoh: 'When she arrives, we will start.' Lainnya: because (reason), if (condition), although (contrast).

questions.question: Kalimat mana yang hanya memiliki 1 Independent Clause (Simple Sentence)?
options: She studied hard and passed the exam
If you work hard, you will succeed
He went to the store yesterday
questions.explanation: 'He went to the store yesterday' = 1 independent clause only = simple sentence. Opsi lain: compound (2 IC) atau complex (1 IC + 1 DC).

questions.question: Dalam 'The book that I borrowed is interesting', clause 'that I borrowed' memodifikasi...
questions.explanation: Memodifikasi noun 'The book' (mana buku? yang saya pinjam). Adjective/relative clause selalu memodifikasi noun yang mendahuluinya.

questions.question: Kalimat mana yang Simple Sentence (1 Independent Clause)?
options: She reads books and he watches movies
Although she was tired, she continued
She reads books because she loves them
questions.explanation: 'She reads books every day' = 1 IC saja = simple. IC: subject (she) + verb (reads) + object (books). Tidak ada clause tambahan.

questions.question: Kalimat apa yang menggabungkan 2 Independent Clause dengan AND/BUT/OR?
questions.explanation: Compound sentence = 2+ IC digabung coordinating conjunction (FANBOYS: for, and, nor, but, or, yet, so). Contoh: 'She studied hard and she passed.'

questions.question: Dalam 'When she arrived, everyone stopped talking', kalimat ini adalah tipe...
questions.explanation: Complex = 1 IC ('everyone stopped talking') + 1 DC ('When she arrived'). DC diawali subordinating conjunction 'when'.

questions.question: Manakah contoh Compound-Complex Sentence?
options: She studied hard, and although she was tired, she continued
questions.explanation: Compound-Complex = 2 IC ('She studied hard' + 'she continued') + 1 DC ('although she was tired'). Kombinasi compound + complex.

questions.question: Kalimat 'I like coffee' adalah...
questions.explanation: Simple sentence = 1 IC. Subject (I) + verb (like) + object (coffee). Tidak ada clause tambahan.

questions.question: Dalam 'She is intelligent and hardworking but lazy', kalimat ini adalah...
questions.explanation: Compound: 'She is intelligent and hardworking' (IC1) but 'she is lazy' (IC2 implied). Coordinating conjunction 'and' + 'but' menghubungkan 2 IC setara.

questions.question: Tipe kalimat apa dari: 'Although it was raining, they went to the beach because they wanted to'?
questions.explanation: Compound-Complex: IC ('they went to the beach') + DC1 ('Although it was raining') + DC2 ('because they wanted to'). 2 DC + 1 IC = CC.

questions.question: Kalimat manakah yang BUKAN Complex Sentence?
options: If you study, you will pass
questions.explanation: 'She came and he went' = compound (IC + IC + coordinating conjunction). Opsi lain = complex (IC + DC). Coordinating = compound, subordinating = complex.

questions.question: Berapa jumlah Independent Clause dalam Simple Sentence?
questions.explanation: Simple Sentence = tepat 1 Independent Clause. Bisa punya banyak phrase/adjective, tapi hanya 1 IC (subject + verb yang lengkap).

questions.question: Manakah yang merupakan Compound Sentence?
options: She studied because she wanted to pass
When she studied, she felt confident
questions.explanation: 'She studied' (IC1) 'and' (coordinating) 'she passed' (IC2) = Compound. Punya 2 IC dengan coordinating conjunction. Opsi B/C = complex (IC + DC).

topics.title: Tense (Waktu Kerja Kata)
topics.description: Present, Past, Future tenses dengan Simple, Continuous, dan Perfect aspects

questions.question: Waktu kalimat 'She studies English every day' adalah...
questions.explanation: Simple Present. Ciri: verb dasar + -s (he/she/it). Marker: 'every day' (routine). Fungsi: kebiasaan/fakta umum yang berulang.

questions.question: Kalimat manakah yang Present Continuous?
questions.explanation: 'She is studying now' = am/is/are + V-ing. Marker: 'now', 'at the moment'. Fungsi: aksi sedang berlangsung di saat ini.

questions.question: Dalam 'They finished the project yesterday', waktu yang digunakan adalah...
questions.explanation: Simple Past. V2 (finished). Marker: 'yesterday'. Fungsi: aksi yang sudah selesai di masa lalu yang spesifik/jelas.

questions.question: Kalimat manakah yang Past Continuous?
options: He was studying when I called
questions.explanation: 'He was studying' = was/were + V-ing. Marker: 'when' (menunjukkan 2 aksi di masa lalu). Aksi yang sedang berlangsung saat aksi lain terjadi.

questions.question: Tense yang tepat untuk 'I ___ in this city for 5 years' adalah...
questions.explanation: 'Have lived' = Present Perfect (have/has + V3). Marker: 'for 5 years' (durasi dari dulu sampai sekarang). Menunjukkan pengalaman/pencapaian hingga kini.

questions.question: Kalimat manakah yang Simple Future?
questions.explanation: 'She will study' = will + V1. Marker: 'tomorrow', 'next week'. Fungsi: rencana/prediksi masa depan yang belum pasti atau keputusan spontan.

questions.question: Dalam 'By next year, she will have graduated', tense yang digunakan adalah...
questions.explanation: Future Perfect = will have + V3. Marker: 'by' (menunjukkan batas waktu). Aksi akan selesai sebelum waktu tertentu di masa depan.

questions.question: Manakah kalimat yang menggunakan Present Perfect dengan BENAR?
questions.explanation: 'She has gone' benar. Present Perfect: have/has + V3. V3 'gone' (bukan 'went'). Menunjukkan pengalaman yang relevan hingga sekarang.

questions.question: Tense manakah yang menunjukkan aksi yang sedang berlangsung saat ini?
questions.explanation: Present Continuous = am/is/are + V-ing. Menunjukkan aksi yang happening right now, in progress. Contoh: 'I am writing a letter.'

questions.question: Dalam 'When he arrived, she had already left', tense 'had left' adalah...
questions.explanation: Past Perfect = had + V3. Menunjukkan 2 aksi di masa lalu, 'had left' terjadi LEBIH DULU sebelum 'arrived'. Hubungan: lebih lama dulu.
